---
name: Feature / Task
about: A development task or feature — a Scrum backlog item (branch-per-ticket → PR → squash)
title: '<type>(<scope>): <short description>'
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Title uses conventional-commit style, e.g.
  chore(infra): docker compose dev environment (Ollama + SQL Server)
  feat(chat): POST /api/chat single endpoint
Type: feat | fix | refactor | chore | spike
-->

## Context
<!-- 1–2 sentences: what this delivers and why. Link the driving doc/decision, e.g. docs/mvp-request.md (D2). -->

## Scope (in)
<!-- What this ticket delivers. Keep it small enough to review as one PR. -->
-

## Scope (out)
<!-- Deliberately NOT here — sibling tickets or later milestones. -->
-

## Tasks
<!-- Concrete subtasks. -->
- [ ]

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Observable, testable conditions for "done". -->
- [ ]

## Depends on
<!-- Tickets/issues that must merge into main first. Delete if none. -->
-

## Notes
<!-- Optional: trade-offs, risks, gotchas. Delete if empty. -->
